archetype.name: Game Hunter
archetype.note: This archetype offers Hunter's Aim at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Hunter's Aim
feat.text: When you focus on aiming, your attack becomes particularly accurate. Make a ranged weapon Strike against your hunted prey. On this Strike, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the attack roll and ignore your prey’s concealed condition and any lesser cover.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
